marketName: All Other Miscellaneous Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing
coreJobStatement: Design and manufacture miscellaneous fabricated metal products — including machine bases, slideways, clamping fixtures, jigs, structural brackets, and custom mechanical assemblies — that meet specified dimensional accuracy, load capacity, and surface quality requirements for industrial machinery and equipment applications
outputTypes: Slideways & guide elements (slideway rail profiles with IH face, wear strip profiles) — highest differentiation
Clamping sections & fixtures (T-slot, dovetail, custom clamping profiles)
Jigs & tooling plates (precision rectangular bar profiles, fixture base profiles)
Custom structural brackets (C-channel, L-angle, asymmetric structural profiles)
Wear strips & inserts (IH flat/profiled wear sections in C60, 100Cr6)
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what process steps and equipment compose the general fabricated metal product manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~USD 32B global (NAICS 332999 + adjacent misc. fabricated metal, 2025); CAGR ~4.2%. Profile-intensive segment (custom structural sections, precision slideways, clamping/fixture elements): estimated USD 4-6B (2025), CAGR ~4.5% [SRC: web_search]

l6Systems.name: Material & Semi-Finished Stock Procurement
l6Systems.jobFamily: Source and receive steel bar stock, plate, tube, and semi-finished profile sections as raw inputs for all fabricated metal assemblies

l6Systems.name: Precision Machining & Shaping
l6Systems.jobFamily: Transform raw/semi-finished inputs into dimensioned mechanical components — slideways, clamping jaws, fixture bodies, bracket sections

l6Systems.name: Surface Treatment & Hardening
l6Systems.jobFamily: Harden, grind, or coat wear-critical surfaces to achieve specified hardness, flatness, and corrosion resistance

l6Systems.name: Assembly & Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Join machined components into sub-assemblies and complete mechanical units via bolting, welding, pressing, and alignment

l6Systems.name: Functional Testing & Inspection
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify dimensional accuracy, alignment, load capacity, and surface finish against customer drawings and DIN/ISO standards

l6Systems.name: Packaging & Dispatch
l6Systems.jobFamily: Preserve, package, and ship qualified fabricated metal products to machinery builders or end-user maintenance operations

l6Systems.name: Quality & Metrology
l6Systems.jobFamily: CMM dimensional inspection, surface roughness measurement, hardness verification across all core steps

l6Systems.name: HSE Compliance
l6Systems.jobFamily: Cutting fluid management, weld fume extraction, operator safety across all steps

vnUnits.name: Precision-Formed Steel Profile Sections
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cold-drawn/cold-rolled near-net-shape profiles for slideways, clamping sections, wear strips, jig bases, and structural brackets. ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. ~10-15% of steel input by value for profile-addressable assemblies.

vnUnits.name: Hot-Rolled Standard Bar Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Standard round, flat, square, hex bar stock (dominant — ~50-60% of steel input). Requires flame-cutting and extensive CNC milling.

vnUnits.name: Pre-Cut Plate Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Flame/laser-cut blanks from EN 10025 plate (~20-25% of steel input). Zero tooling cost but high nesting waste.

vnUnits.name: Cast Iron / Steel Castings
vnUnits.functionalJob: Sand casting (GJL-250, GJS-500) for machine bases and housings (~65% of castings share).

vnUnits.name: CNC Milling & Turning Centers
vnUnits.functionalJob: 3-axis CNC milling (dominant ~55%), 5-axis CNC milling (25%), CNC turning (15%), manual machining (5%).

vnUnits.name: Induction Hardening Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Induction hardening (dominant ~50% of hardening), case hardening furnaces (20%), flame hardening (15%), through hardening (15%).

vnUnits.name: Surface Grinding Machines
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal surface grinder (slideway faces, ~65%), cylindrical grinder (25%), jig grinder (10%).

strategicPosition: ZOLLERN PRIMARY at L5 Precision-Formed Steel Profile Sections under L6a Material & Semi-Finished Stock Procurement. Supplies slideway rail profiles (IH face), wear strip inserts (IH up to 64 HRC), and structural sub-frame sections. Strongest differentiation in hardened flat slideway segment (40% of linear guidance market) where pre-hardened profile delivery eliminates OEM L6c step entirely.

sources.label: NAICS 332999 — All Other Miscellaneous Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing
